name: Whack-a-Mole
description: Tap moles as they pop up from holes! Build combos for bonus points. Speed increases as you score higher. 30-second rounds — how high can you go?

contributions.Elanor Brightloom: UI layout & CSS — 3x3 grid, dark carnival color scheme (#1a0a2e background, #3d1f00 holes), hit/miss visual feedback (yellow burst on hit, red pulse on miss), mobile-first 90px minimum tap targets
contributions.Míriel Goldthread: Visual theme — underground garden aesthetic, emoji moles (🐭→😵 on hit), pop-up/retreat animations (scaleY transitions), floating combo text, screen shake on 3+ combos, amber-glowing combo multiplier
contributions.Narvi Irondeep: Logic review — isOccupied flag per hole, 100ms grace window for late clicks, 400ms speed floor, N-1 active mole cap, touchstart/click dedup for mobile, visibility API pause, 8x combo cap, single setInterval architecture
